description: Anima (Cosmos-Predict2 + Qwen3) character LoRA — 5-section official format (tdrussell + lilting v4 validated). Quality anchor + NL paragraph + booru tags. Preserves Qwen3 causal-attention front-loading.

variables.name: character_name
